name: Steyr - KLBR Replika
description:
Professional cabbagehead mind-reader schizo midget.

A mix of a card from Technetium (Janitor), a lorebook from Meep (Chub), another lorebook from Auroth (Chub) and me :)

If you want, pls share chat :)

Intros:

1. Watching the factory buzz

2. Kolibri meeting about the "fine" state of Sierpinski

3. You did an oopsie and Steyr is tasked of smacking some sense into you (Gestalt)

4. You did an oopsie and Steyr is tasked of smacking some sense into you (Replika)

5. Library sesh

6. Funny short girl does funny short thing

  1. Another kind of interrogation, more Kolibri-esque
